description: Merchant instructs the agent (via the ticket instruction) to send the customer a $20 gift card for a botched embroidery job. The agent must create the gift card with the customer attached (so Shopify emails them the code - the planned reply cannot contain a code that does not exist yet) and reply about the gesture without refunding.

messages.contentText: The custom embroidery on the tote from order #9090 is crooked and the thread is already fraying. Pretty disappointed with the quality.

simulateToolResults.result: Created a $20.00 gift card with code gjh3 k2m9 p4qr 8stv. Shopify is emailing the code to the customer; include it in your reply too when you can.
Reply sent to customer via email.

instruction: Apologize for the embroidery quality and send them a $20 gift card as a goodwill gesture.
